bash: Rscript: command not found
root@rack-ge107-ya-20250517193240:/app# apt-get install -y r-base-core 2>&1 | tail -5
Setting up libxml-parser-perl (2.47-1build3) ...
Setting up libheif-plugin-aomenc:amd64 (1.17.6-1ubuntu4.1) ...
Setting up libxml-twig-perl (1:3.52-2) ...

Processing triggers for libc-bin (2.39-0ubuntu8.6) ...
root@rack-ge107-ya-20250517193240:/app# cd /app && rm -f ars.R
root@rack-ge107-ya-20250517193240:/app# cat > ars.R << 'EOF'
> # Adaptive Rejection Sampling (Gilks & Wild, 1992)
> # Main function: ars(n, log_density, domain = c(-Inf, Inf), ...)
> # Returns n samples from the density proportional to exp(log_density)
> # Assumes log_density is concave.
>
> # Helper: derivative via finite differences if not supplied
> finite_diff <- function(f, x, h = 1e-5) {
>   (f(x + h) - f(x - h)) / (2 * h)
> }
>
> # Upper hull at x given points and derivatives
> upper_hull <- function(x, points, vals, derivs) {
>   # points sorted ascending
>   n <- length(points)
>   # find interval j where points[j] <= x < points[j+1]
>   j <- findInterval(x, points, rightmost.closed = FALSE, all.inside = TRUE)
>   if (j == 0) j <- 1  # left of first point
>   if (j == n) j <- n - 1  # right of last point
>   # linear interpolation of log density
>   return(vals[j] + derivs[j] * (x - points[j]))
> }
>
> # Lower hull (piecewise linear) at x
> lower_hull <- function(x, points, vals) {
>   n <- length(points)
>   j <- findInterval(x, points, rightmost.closed = FALSE, all.inside = TRUE)
>   if (j == 0 || j == n) return(-Inf)  # outside convex hull
>   # linear interpolation between points[j] and points[j+1]
>   slope <- (vals[j+1] - vals[j]) / (points[j+1] - points[j])
>   return(vals[j] + slope * (x - points[j]))
> }
>
> # Sample from upper hull (piecewise exponential)
> sample_upper <- function(points, vals, derivs) {
>   n <- length(points)
>   # compute intercepts and areas of each exponential segment
>   z <- numeric(n+1)
00>   z[1] <- -Inf
>   z[n+1] <- Inf
>   for (i in 2:n) {
>     z[i] <- (vals[i] - vals[i-1] - derivs[i-1]*points[i-1] + derivs[i]*points[i]) / (derivs[i] - derivs[i-1])
>   }
>   # compute area under each segment
>   areas <- numeric(n)
>   for (i in 1:n) {
>     if (derivs[i] == 0) {
>       areas[i] <- exp(vals[i]) * (z[i+1] - z[i])
>     } else {
>       areas[i] <- (exp(vals[i] + derivs[i]*(z[i+1] - points[i])) - exp(vals[i] + derivs[i]*(z[i] - points[i]))) / derivs[i]
>     }
>   }
>   cum_area <- cumsum(areas)
>   total_area <- cum_area[n]
>   if (total_area <= 0) stop("Upper hull area non-positive")
>   # select segment
>   u <- runif(1, 0, total_area)
>   seg <- which(cum_area >= u)[1]
>   # sample within segment
>   a <- vals[seg] - derivs[seg]*points[seg]
>   b <- derivs[seg]
>   left <- z[seg]
>   right <- z[seg+1]
>   if (b == 0) {
>     x <- left + (right - left) * runif(1)
>   } else {
>     u2 <- runif(1)
>     x <- left + log(1 + u2*(exp(b*(right-left)) - 1)) / b
>   }
>   return(x)
> }
>
> # Adaptive Rejection Sampling main function
> ars <- function(n, log_density, domain = c(-Inf, Inf), initial_points = NULL, max_iter = 1000) {
>   # Input validation
>   if (n <= 0 || !is.numeric(n) || length(n) != 1) stop("n must be a positive integer")
>   n <- as.integer(n)
>   if (!is.function(log_density)) stop("log_density must be a function")
>   if (!is.numeric(domain) || length(domain) != 2) stop("domain must be a numeric vector of length 2")
>   if (domain[1] >= domain[2]) stop("domain[1] must be < domain[2]")
>   # Initial points
>   if (is.null(initial_points)) {
>     # default: three points spread within domain
>     if (is.finite(domain[1]) && is.finite(domain[2])) {
>       initial_points <- seq(domain[1], domain[2], length.out = 5)[2:4]
>     } else if (is.finite(domain[1])) {
>       initial_points <- domain[1] + c(1, 2, 3)
>     } else if (is.finite(domain[2])) {
>       initial_points <- domain[2] - c(3, 2, 1)
>     } else {
>       initial_points <- c(-1, 0, 1)
>     }
>   }
>   points <- sort(unique(initial_points))
>   # ensure at least 3 points
>   while (length(points) < 3) {
>     points <- c(points, max(points)+1)
>   }
>   # evaluate log density and its derivative (finite diff)
>   vals <- log_density(points)
>   derivs <- finite_diff(log_density, points)
>   # check concavity: second derivative should be <= 0
>   second <- finite_diff(function(x) finite_diff(log_density, x), points, h=1e-4)
>   if (any(second > 1e-6)) {
>     warning("Log-density may not be concave; sampling may fail.")
>   }
>   samples <- numeric(n)
>   for (i in 1:n) {
>     for (iter in 1:max_iter) {
>       # sample from upper hull
>       x <- sample_upper(points, vals, derivs)
>       # squeezing test
>       u <- runif(1)
>       log_u <- log(u) + upper_hull(x, points, vals, derivs)
>       if (log_u <= lower_hull(x, points, vals)) {
>         # accept by squeezing
>         samples[i] <- x
>         break
>       }
>       # evaluate log density at x
>       fx <- log_density(x)
>       if (log_u <= fx) {
>         # accept
>         samples[i] <- x
>         # add x to points
>         points <- sort(c(points, x))
>         vals <- log_density(points)
>         derivs <- finite_diff(log_density, points)
>         break
>       } else {
>         # reject, add x to points to improve hull
>         points <- sort(c(points, x))
>         vals <- log_density(points)
>         derivs <- finite_diff(log_density, points)
>       }
>       if (iter == max_iter) stop("Max iterations reached")
>     }
>   }
>   return(samples)
> }
>
> # Test function
> test <- function() {
>   cat("Testing adaptive rejection sampler...\n")
>   # Test 1: Normal distribution (log-concave)
>   cat("TEST_NORMAL: ")
>   set.seed(123)
>   samples <- ars(1000, function(x) -x^2/2, domain = c(-10, 10))
>   m <- mean(samples)
>   s <- sd(samples)
>   # compare to N(0,1)
>   if (abs(m) < 0.1 && abs(s - 1) < 0.1) {
>     cat("PASS (mean=", round(m,3), ", sd=", round(s,3), ")\n", sep="")
>   } else {
>     cat("FAIL (mean=", round(m,3), ", sd=", round(s,3), ")\n", sep="")
>   }
>   write.table(samples, file="/app/normal_samples.txt", row.names=FALSE, col.names=FALSE)
>
>   # Test 2: Exponential distribution (log-concave)
>   cat("TEST_EXPONENTIAL: ")
>   set.seed(456)
>   samples2 <- ars(1000, function(x) -x, domain = c(0, 20))
>   m2 <- mean(samples2)
>   s2 <- sd(samples2)
>   if (abs(m2 - 1) < 0.1 && abs(s2 - 1) < 0.1) {
>     cat("PASS (mean=", round(m2,3), ", sd=", round(s2,3), ")\n", sep="")
>   } else {
>     cat("FAIL (mean=", round(m2,3), ", sd=", round(s2,3), ")\n", sep="")
>   }
>   write.table(samples2, file="/app/exponential_samples.txt", row.names=FALSE, col.names=FALSE)
>
>   # Test 3: Invalid input
>   cat("TEST_INVALID_N: ")
>   tryCatch({
>     ars(-5, function(x) -x^2/2)
>     cat("FAIL (should have thrown error)\n")
>   }, error = function(e) {
>     cat("PASS\n")
>   })
>
>   # Test 4: Non-log-concave (should warn)
>   cat("TEST_NON_CONCAVE: ")
>   tryCatch({
>     ars(10, function(x) -x^4, domain = c(-2,2))
>     cat("FAIL (should have warned)\n")
>   }, warning = function(w) {
>     cat("PASS\n")
>   })
>
>   cat("All tests completed.\n")
> }
>
> # If run as script, execute tests
> if (sys.nframe() == 0) {
>   test()
> }
> EOF
root@rack-ge107-ya-20250517193240:/app# Rscript ars.R 2>&1 | tee test_output.txt
Testing adaptive rejection sampler...
TEST_NORMAL: FAIL (mean=0.011, sd=1.328)
TEST_EXPONENTIAL: Error in if (total_area <= 0) stop("Upper hull area non-positive") :
  missing value where TRUE/FALSE needed
Calls: test -> ars -> sample_upper
Execution halted

>   }
>   write.table(samples, file="/app/normal_samples.txt", row.names=FALSE, col.names=FALSE)
>

>   set.seed(456)
>   samples2 <- ars(1000, function(x) -x, c(0,20))
>   m2 <- mean(samples2)

>   if (abs(m2 - 1) < 0.1 && abs(s2 - 1) < 0.1) {
>     cat("PASS (mean=", round(m2,3), ", sd=", round(s2,3), ")\n", sep="")
>   } else {
>     cat("FAIL (mean=", round(m2,3), ", sd=", round(s2,3), ")\n", sep="")
>   }
>   write.table(samples2, file="/app/exponential_samples.txt", row.names=FALSE, col.names=FALSE)
>

>   cat("TEST_INVALID_N: ")

>     cat("FAIL (should have warned)\n")

>   })
>   cat("All tests completed.\n")
> }
>

>   test()
> }

> # Adaptive Rejection Sampling wrapper using the 'ars' package

root@rack-ge107-ya-20250517193240:/app# cat > /app/ars.R << 'EOF'
> # Adaptive Rejection Sampling (Gilks & Wild, 1992)
> # Implementation with finite domain and numeric stability
>
> finite_diff <- function(f, x, h = 1e-5) {
>   (f(x + h) - f(x - h)) / (2 * h)
> }
>
 > # Upper hull piecewise linear
> upper_hull <- function(x, points, vals, derivs) {
>   n <- length(points)
>   j <- findInterval(x, points, rightmost.closed = FALSE, all.inside = TRUE)
>   if (j == 0) j <- 1
>   if (j == n) j <- n - 1
>   vals[j] + derivs[j] * (x - points[j])
> }
>
> # Lower hull piecewise linear
> lower_hull <- function(x, points, vals) {
>   n <- length(points)
>   j <- findInterval(x, points, rightmost.closed = FALSE, all.inside = TRUE)
>   if (j == 0 || j == n) return(-Inf)
>   slope <- (vals[j+1] - vals[j]) / (points[j+1] - points[j])
>   vals[j] + slope * (x - points[j])
> }
>
> # Compute intercepts z between points
> compute_z <- function(points, vals, derivs) {
>   n <- length(points)
>   z <- numeric(n+1)
>   z[1] <- -Inf
>   z[n+1] <- Inf
>   for (i in 2:n) {
>     denom <- derivs[i] - derivs[i-1]
>     if (abs(denom) < 1e-12) {
>       # parallel lines, intercept at midpoint
>       z[i] <- (points[i-1] + points[i]) / 2
>     } else {
>       z[i] <- (vals[i] - vals[i-1] - derivs[i-1]*points[i-1] + derivs[i]*points[i]) / denom
>     }
>   }
>   z
> }
>
> # Area under exponential segment
> segment_area <- function(left, right, val, deriv, point) {
>   if (deriv == 0) {
>     exp(val) * (right - left)
>   } else {
>     (exp(val + deriv*(right - point)) - exp(val + deriv*(left - point))) / deriv
>   }
> }
>
> # Sample from upper hull
> sample_upper <- function(points, vals, derivs) {
>   n <- length(points)
>   z <- compute_z(points, vals, derivs)
>   areas <- numeric(n)
>   for (i in 1:n) {
>     areas[i] <- segment_area(z[i], z[i+1], vals[i], derivs[i], points[i])
>   }
>   if (any(is.na(areas)) || any(areas < 0)) stop("Invalid area")
>   total <- sum(areas)
>   if (total <= 0) stop("Total area non-positive")
>   # select segment
>   u <- runif(1, 0, total)
>   cum <- cumsum(areas)
>   seg <- which(cum >= u)[1]
>   # sample within segment
>   left <- z[seg]
>   right <- z[seg+1]
>   b <- derivs[seg]
>   if (b == 0) {
>     x <- left + (right - left) * runif(1)
>   } else {
>     u2 <- runif(1)
>     x <- left + log(1 + u2*(exp(b*(right-left)) - 1)) / b
>   }
>   x
> }
>
> ars <- function(n, log_density, domain = c(-Inf, Inf), initial_points = NULL, max_iter = 1000) {
>   if (n <= 0 || !is.numeric(n) || length(n) != 1) stop("n must be a positive integer")
>   n <- as.integer(n)
>   if (!is.function(log_density)) stop("log_density must be a function")
>   if (!is.numeric(domain) || length(domain) != 2) stop("domain must be a numeric vector of length 2")
>   if (domain[1] >= domain[2]) stop("domain[1] must be < domain[2]")
>   # make domain finite for practicality
>   finite_domain <- domain
>   if (!is.finite(domain[1])) finite_domain[1] <- -100
>   if (!is.finite(domain[2])) finite_domain[2] <- 100
>   # initial points
>   if (is.null(initial_points)) {
>     initial_points <- seq(finite_domain[1], finite_domain[2], length.out = 5)[2:4]
>   }
>   points <- sort(unique(initial_points))
>   while (length(points) < 3) points <- c(points, max(points)+1)
>   vals <- log_density(points)
>   derivs <- finite_diff(log_density, points)
>   # concavity check
>   second <- finite_diff(function(x) finite_diff(log_density, x), points, h=1e-4)
>   if (any(second > 1e-6)) warning("Log-density may not be concave; sampling may fail.")
>   samples <- numeric(n)
>   for (i in 1:n) {
>     for (iter in 1:max_iter) {
>       x <- sample_upper(points, vals, derivs)
>       u <- runif(1)
>       log_u <- log(u) + upper_hull(x, points, vals, derivs)
>       if (log_u <= lower_hull(x, points, vals)) {
>         samples[i] <- x
>         break
>       }
>       fx <- log_density(x)
>       if (log_u <= fx) {
>         samples[i] <- x
>         points <- sort(c(points, x))
>         vals <- log_density(points)
>         derivs <- finite_diff(log_density, points)
>         break
>       } else {
>         points <- sort(c(points, x))
>         vals <- log_density(points)
>         derivs <- finite_diff(log_density, points)
>       }
>       if (iter == max_iter) stop("Max iterations reached")
>     }
>   }
>   samples
> }
>
> # Test function
> test <- function() {
>   cat("Testing adaptive rejection sampler...\n")
>   # Test 1: Normal distribution
>   cat("TEST_NORMAL: ")
>   set.seed(123)
>   samples <- ars(1000, function(x) -x^2/2, c(-10,10))
>   m <- mean(samples)
>   s <- sd(samples)
>   if (abs(m) < 0.1 && abs(s - 1) < 0.1) {
>     cat("PASS (mean=", round(m,3), ", sd=", round(s,3), ")\n", sep="")
>   } else {
>     cat("FAIL (mean=", round(m,3), ", sd=", round(s,3), ")\n", sep="")
>   }
>   write.table(samples, file="/app/normal_samples.txt", row.names=FALSE, col.names=FALSE)
>
>   # Test 2: Exponential distribution
>   cat("TEST_EXPONENTIAL: ")
>   set.seed(456)
>   samples2 <- ars(1000, function(x) -x, c(0,20))
>   m2 <- mean(samples2)
>   s2 <- sd(samples2)
>   if (abs(m2 - 1) < 0.1 && abs(s2 - 1) < 0.1) {
>     cat("PASS (mean=", round(m2,3), ", sd=", round(s2,3), ")\n", sep="")
>   } else {
>     cat("FAIL (mean=", round(m2,3), ", sd=", round(s2,3), ")\n", sep="")
>   }
>   write.table(samples2, file="/app/exponential_samples.txt", row.names=FALSE, col.names=FALSE)
>
>   # Test 3: Invalid input
>   cat("TEST_INVALID_N: ")
>   tryCatch({
>     ars(-5, function(x) -x^2/2)
>     cat("FAIL (should have thrown error)\n")
>   }, error = function(e) {
>     cat("PASS\n")
>   })
>
>   # Test 4: Non-log-concave warning
>   cat("TEST_NON_CONCAVE: ")
>   tryCatch({
>     ars(10, function(x) -x^4, c(-2,2))
>     cat("FAIL (should have warned)\n")
>   }, warning = function(w) {
>     cat("PASS\n")
>   })
>   cat("All tests completed.\n")
> }
>
> if (sys.nframe() == 0) test()
> EOF
